observed_available_at_calculation: maximum of complete-response-received UTC, parsed provider HTTP Date, and provider server time associated with the cycle
pit_eligibility_requirements: HTTPS request succeeded with hostname and TLS verification
provider HTTP Date and server-time evidence exist and parse
local UTC clock evidence has timedatectl NTPSynchronized=yes
all required receipt fields exist and both receipt chains verify
raw response bytes match their recorded SHA-256
candle close_time_ms is strictly earlier than provider server time
durable accepted receipt exists before any future evaluation cutoff
